'''Beta Ioli''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Junior Lieutenant/Legends|Junior Lieutenant]] in the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] who was a part of the crew of the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']].

==Biography==
She was part of the the crew of the [[Rover (skiff)|''Rover'']], under the command of Jedi apprentice [[Ben Skywalker]], that was sent to [[Terephon]] to find out what had become of [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Zekk]] after their mission to Terephon. She was killed when the ''Rover'' was destroyed in the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]].
